skills.name: devo-devtool
skills.description: Developer tooling — Jenkins CI/CD (builds, deployments, disk management), GitLab pipeline fixes (auth, loops, Vault migration), and Monitoring (Grafana, Prometheus, Alertmanager silences across all prod clusters).
prompts: Trigger or troubleshoot a Jenkins build or deployment
Check Grafana dashboards or Prometheus metrics
Free up disk space on Jenkins
